The '''''Punisher''''' was an [[Imperial-class Star Destroyer/Legends|''Imperial''-class Star Destroyer]] of the [[Imperial Navy/Legends|Imperial Navy]]. It was once commanded by [[Captain/Legends|Captain]] [[Hugo Treece]].

The ''Punisher'' was involved in the capture of a rebel [[Ton-Falk-class escort carrier|escort carrier]].

==Appearances==
*[[Star Wars: Rebellion (video game)|''Star Wars: Rebellion'']]
*[[Star Wars: TIE Fighter (video game)|''Star Wars: TIE Fighter'']]
